languages.original_text: "Anyone who witnesses the consequences of thoughtless flirtation with the energies of the Immaterium will think twice before setting foot on this crooked path. I find the sight not merely sad, but also highly instructive."

languages.text: "Любой, кто узреет последствия бездумных заигрываний с энергиями Имматериума, многажды подумает перед тем, как ступить на эту извилистую стезю. Я нахожу это зрелище не только лишь печальным, но весьма поучительным".

"Anyone who witnesses the consequences of thoughtless flirtation with the energies of the Immaterium will think twice before setting foot on this crooked path. I find the sight not merely sad, but also highly instructive."
languages.original_text: "Любой, кто узреет последствия бездумных заигрываний с энергиями Имматериума, многажды подумает перед тем, как ступить на эту извилистую стезю. Я нахожу это зрелище не только лишь печальным, но весьма поучительным".

"Anyone who witnesses the consequences of thoughtless flirtation with the energies of the Immaterium will think twice before setting foot on this crooked path. I find the sight not merely sad, but also highly instructive."

languages.text: «Todo el que observa las consecuencias del coqueteo irreflexivo con las energías del Inmaterio se lo pensará dos veces antes de recorrer este camino retorcido. Esta imagen no solo es triste: también es muy educativa».
languages.original_text: "Anyone who witnesses the consequences of thoughtless flirtation with the energies of the Immaterium will think twice before setting foot on this crooked path. I find the sight not merely sad, but also highly instructive."

traits.locale_text: «Todo el que observa las consecuencias del coqueteo irreflexivo con las energías del Inmaterio se lo pensará dos veces antes de recorrer este camino retorcido. Esta imagen no solo es triste: también es muy educativa».

languages.text: 「非物質世界のエネルギーとの軽率な戯れがもたらす結果を目の当たりにした者は誰しも、この曲がった道に足を踏み入れる前に、二の足を踏むことでしょう。私はこの光景を、単に悲しいだけでなく、きわめて教訓的なものだと感じます」
languages.original_text: "Anyone who witnesses the consequences of thoughtless flirtation with the energies of the Immaterium will think twice before setting foot on this crooked path. I find the sight not merely sad, but also highly instructive."

traits.locale_text: 「非物質世界のエネルギーとの軽率な戯れがもたらす結果を目の当たりにした者は誰しも、この曲がった道に足を踏み入れる前に、二の足を踏むことでしょう。私はこの光景を、単に悲しいだけでなく、きわめて教訓的なものだと感じます」

languages.text: “若目睹过对亚空间能量持轻浮态度的后果，任何人在踏上这条歧途之前都会三思。我认为这一幕不仅可悲，而且极具启发意义。”
languages.original_text: "Anyone who witnesses the consequences of thoughtless flirtation with the energies of the Immaterium will think twice before setting foot on this crooked path. I find the sight not merely sad, but also highly instructive."

traits.locale_text: “若目睹过对亚空间能量持轻浮态度的后果，任何人在踏上这条歧途之前都会三思。我认为这一幕不仅可悲，而且极具启发意义。”

languages.text: "Wer die Folgen gedankenloser Koketterie mit den Energien des Immateriums gesehen hat, wird es sich zweimal überlegen, diesen trügerischen Pfad zu betreten. Ich finde den Anblick nicht nur traurig, sondern auch ausgesprochen lehrreich."
languages.original_text: "Anyone who witnesses the consequences of thoughtless flirtation with the energies of the Immaterium will think twice before setting foot on this crooked path. I find the sight not merely sad, but also highly instructive."

traits.locale_text: "Wer die Folgen gedankenloser Koketterie mit den Energien des Immateriums gesehen hat, wird es sich zweimal überlegen, diesen trügerischen Pfad zu betreten. Ich finde den Anblick nicht nur traurig, sondern auch ausgesprochen lehrreich."

languages.text: « Quiconque est témoin des conséquences des interactions irréfléchies avec les énergies de l'Immaterium y pensera à deux fois avant d'emprunter cette voie pervertie. Je trouve cela non seulement triste, mais aussi hautement instructif. »
languages.original_text: "Anyone who witnesses the consequences of thoughtless flirtation with the energies of the Immaterium will think twice before setting foot on this crooked path. I find the sight not merely sad, but also highly instructive."

traits.locale_text: « Quiconque est témoin des conséquences des interactions irréfléchies avec les énergies de l'Immaterium y pensera à deux fois avant d'emprunter cette voie pervertie. Je trouve cela non seulement triste, mais aussi hautement instructif. »

languages.text: "Tindiyar'ın enerjileriyle düşüncesizce flört etmenin sonuçlarına tanık olan herkes, bu çarpık yola adım atmadan önce iki kez düşünecektir. Bu manzarayı sadece üzücü değil, aynı zamanda son derece öğretici buluyorum."
languages.original_text: "Anyone who witnesses the consequences of thoughtless flirtation with the energies of the Immaterium will think twice before setting foot on this crooked path. I find the sight not merely sad, but also highly instructive."
